# @microservices-sh/research

Research pillar: ingest knowledge, retrieve by semantic search, produce cited briefs (cite-or-refuse).

Exports (src/index.ts):
- ingestSource(input, { store, vectorStore, embedder, now, actor, audit? }) -> { source }
- research({ question, topK? }, { store, vectorStore, embedder, synthesizer, now, actor, audit? }) -> { brief }
- getBrief({ briefId }, { store, actor }) / listSources({ store, actor })
- createMemoryResearchStore(), createMemoryVectorStore(), chunkContent()
- Ports: EmbeddingPort, VectorStore, Synthesizer, ResearchStore, AuditSink

Events: research.source_ingested, research.brief_created. Permissions: research.read|write|admin|extend|observe.
Rules: cite-or-refuse (422 RESEARCH_NO_SOURCES / RESEARCH_UNCITED), owner-scoped retrieval, fail-closed authz, audit.
